words.def: the time at which something is supposed to begin
words.zh: n. 抵消, 把...並列, 旁系, 支管, 用膠印法印

words.def: one of the digits of the foot
yielding readily to pressure or weight
words.zh: a. 軟的, 溫和的, 柔和的, 柔滑的, 溫柔的, 軟弱的, 坡度小的, 笨的, 紙幣的

words.def: one of the digits of the foot
words.zh: n. 足趾, 趾部, 腳趾
a. 關著的, 不再生效的, 處於...境況的, 休假的, 空閒的

words.def: a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置
